expectations.text: Output includes all 5 stories from the fixture (us001, us002, us003, us013, us014)
Stories are grouped by status (Draft / Ready / Done at minimum)
Each story shows a Connextra-style one-liner with role/want/because
Each story shows its acceptance criteria as bullets
Output ends with a total count summary
Persona aliases are rendered as readable labels ('requestor', 'approver'), not raw [[pn001|...]] wikilinks
